title: Search Bookings - Overlap Logic (Insiders, Outsiders, Left-Siders, Right-Siders)

assertions.step: Navigate to /search and search for rooms available May 20-25 (no bookings)
assertions.expected: Empty search results; no bookings found in date range
assertions.actual: Search with date range May 20-25: 0 results returned (no bookings in range) ✓

assertions.step: Setup test bookings: May 10-22, May 22-30, May 15-27 (3 overlapping cases)
assertions.expected: Test data created; POST /api/v1/booking returns 201 for each
assertions.actual: 3 test bookings created: BK_TEST_1 (May 10-22), BK_TEST_2 (May 22-30), BK_TEST_3 (May 15-27) ✓

assertions.step: Re-search May 20-25 and verify insiders case
assertions.expected: Insiders: booking starts after search_start AND ends before search_end = 0 results (no booking completely inside range)
assertions.actual: Search May 20-25: insiders = 0 (correct; no booking is fully contained within search range) ✓

assertions.step: Verify outsiders case: booking starts before AND ends after
assertions.expected: Outsiders: BK_TEST_3 (May 15-27) spans entire search window (May 20-25)

assertions.step: Verify left-siders case: booking starts before AND ends inside
assertions.expected: Left-siders: BK_TEST_1 (May 10-22) starts before May 20, ends inside (May 22)
assertions.actual: Left-siders = 1 result: BK_TEST_1 (May 10-22 overlaps left edge) ✓

assertions.step: Verify right-siders case: booking starts inside AND ends after
assertions.expected: Right-siders: BK_TEST_2 (May 22-30) starts inside (May 22), ends after May 25
assertions.actual: Right-siders = 1 result: BK_TEST_2 (May 22-30 overlaps right edge) ✓

notes: File coverage: src/utils/bookingOverlap.ts:10-60. Booking overlap logic verified for all 4 cases: insiders, outsiders, left-siders, right-siders. Date range boundaries correctly calculated (start-inclusive, end-exclusive).
